title: athyrium × neoelegans
intro: Athyrium × neoelegans, also known as Lady Fern, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Athyrium genus, native to Asia and Europe. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Athyrium × neoelegans is known to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiviral agent. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in herbal infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
